chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2024 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.06.2022 Mr. Bhooro Bheel, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh Senior Law Officer ECP (Abdullah Hanjra), Law Officer ECP (Zaheer Abbas) & District Election Commissioner Sanghar (Shahnawaz Brohi) *** The grievance of the Petitioner is that he was given election symbol viz: ‘167-Lock’ likewise the covering candidate of Pakistan Peoples’ Party was allocated symbol of ‘Lock with Key’. According to the Petitioner since his symbol is too similar to the symbol of covering candidate of contesting party, it is likely to cause confusion at the time of election, he, therefore, filed an application for redressal of his grievance before the Returning Officer/Respondent No.5, but no order has been passed on his application. We hereby dispose of this petition with directions to the Returning Officer/Respondent No.5 to decide the application for redressal of grievance of Petitioner Zaffar Ali within two days of the date of this Order, in accordance with law. A copy of this order be sent to Returning Officer/Respondent No.5 for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
